┌─ wwakabobik@github:~/profile ─────────────────────────────────────────────┐

<div align="center">

[![Typing SVG](https://readme-typing-svg.demolab.com?font=Fira+Code&weight=500&size=22&duration=3200&pause=900&color=3DDC84&center=true&vCenter=true&multiline=true&width=720&height=70&lines=%24+whoami;QA+Automation+Architect+%C2%B7+AI+Testing+Lead+%C2%B7+SDET)](https://github.com/wwakabobik)

**Python expert.** Avionics → silicon → fintech → streaming → multi-agent AI.  
Same person who signed DO-178B Class A and ships LangGraph agents.

[![LinkedIn](https://img.shields.io/badge/LinkedIn-wwakabobik-0A66C2?style=for-the-badge&logo=linkedin&logoColor=white)](https://www.linkedin.com/in/wwakabobik/)
[![Blog](https://img.shields.io/badge/Blog-wwakabobik.github.io-3DDC84?style=for-the-badge&logo=githubpages&logoColor=white)](https://wwakabobik.github.io/)
[![GitHub](https://img.shields.io/badge/GitHub-wwakabobik-181717?style=for-the-badge&logo=github&logoColor=white)](https://github.com/wwakabobik)

</div>

---

```bash
$ cat ~/mission.txt
```

> I fix the **$100k+/month** problem of slow release cycles and engineering idle time.  
> Build **AI QA processes and frameworks from scratch** — multi-agent **LangGraph** harnesses, **pytest** suites, and the **CI/CD** that ties it together — so product teams ship daily with confidence.  
> Equally comfortable architecting QA for a 1200-engineer org and writing the Python that runs it.

```bash
$ cat ~/open_to.txt
```

`Staff / Principal SDET` · `Head of QA Engineering` · `Fractional QA Leadership` · consulting

---

```bash
$ history | grep -E 'employer|client' | grep -v toxic
```

</div>

```text
  Liebherr-Aerospace     safety-critical fly-by-wire · Airbus / Bombardier / Sukhoi
  Auriga × Intel         hundreds of thousands of tests/day · years before Appium existed
  Luxoft                 test strategy & audits · Deutsche Bank delivery centre
  Mediaplatform          300 → 1500+ tests · daily DevOps pipeline · pylint 5.3 → 9.98
  Statusmoney            pytest/Selenium/Appium from zero · ~80% coverage · 7 platforms
  Now                    multi-agent AI QA · frameworks from scratch · RAG · LLM-as-a-judge
```

---

```bash
$ tree ~/skills -L 1 --dirsfirst
```

---

```bash
$ journalctl -u career --priority=crit -n 8 --no-pager
```

```text
● hardcore.timeline
  ├─ Certified Class A avionics (DO-178B / MISRA) for Airbus, Bombardier, Sukhoi
  ├─ Intel R&D: mass-scale toolchain + early Android HW tests — pre-Appium era
  ├─ Mediaplatform: 5× test suite growth into a daily release pipeline
  ├─ Statusmoney: automation from scratch across 7 platforms (~80% coverage)
  ├─ Raised legacy framework health pylint 5.3 → 9.98 without freezing delivery
  ├─ Zero-to-one RAG marketing platform (LangGraph · Postgres · S3 · email agents)
  ├─ Productised AI bots: Telegram / WhatsApp / Discord + TTS + WebRTC voice
  └─ Multi-agent AI QA from scratch: processes, harnesses, LLM-as-a-judge eval
```

---

```bash
$ ./bin/snake --from contribution-graph --render svg
# contribution cells get eaten. daily cron keeps it honest.
```

    <source media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)" srcset="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/wwakabobik/wwakabobik/output/github-contribution-grid-snake-dark.svg">

---

```bash
$ fortune | cowsay -f tux
```
